description: Create a Python-based Talon command conflict analyzer to identify duplicate command phrases within the five .talon files located at C:\Users\Docker\.talon\user\commands\. Develop a Python script at C:\Users\Docker\.talon\user\tools\conflict_analyzer.py to detect overlaps within and across files, and a Talon voice command file at C:\Users\Docker\.talon\user\tools\analyze_commands.talon to trigger the process. Save a conflict report to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\conflict_report.txt that explicitly identifies the conflicting phrases and the filenames where they occur.
